name: Kim
intro: Hi, I'm Kim. Ever since I was a little girl, I've dreamed of sailing around the world alone. Now I'm actually going to try it, on my 30-foot sloop, the Serafina. Come share some of the highlights of my voyage.

name: Eli
intro: Hello, mates! The name's Eli. Come along with me and I'll show you the sea the way a sailor knew it two hundred years ago — I'm not sailing alone, not me!

name: Curtis
intro: My name's Curtis, and I rescue people for a living. When people think about dangers at sea, they think about hurricanes and shipwrecks and sharks — all the spectacular stuff. But it's usually the little things that get people in big trouble. Come along, and I'll show you what I mean.

name: Frank
intro: After I retired, I spent too much time around the house. "Get a hobby," my wife Elsie said. So I went looking for something new to do — and I picked scuba diving. You wouldn't believe what's down there. Come along, and I'll show you.

name: Zarka
intro: Greetings. I am Zarka, a citizen of the planet Maris — a world where intelligent life lives in liquid oceans. My team is studying the water planets of your galaxy. Please accompany me, and assist in our study of your remarkable sea.

name: Rebecca
intro: Hi, my name is Rebecca, and I'm an oceanographer. Come along, and let me share with you some of the amazing things I've learned about the sea.
